```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-left:4px solid #5654A2;border-radius:0 12px 12px 0;padding:0.7em 1em;text-align:left;margin-bottom:0.95em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.08);">
  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.2em;">recap · parts 01 + 02</div>
  <div style="font-size:0.65em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.45;">
   <span style="color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;">Speed</span> + <span style="color:#C4881A;font-weight:700;">reproducibility</span> &nbsp;≠&nbsp; <span style="color:#D45F47;font-weight:700;">credibility</span>.
  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.65em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 0.9em 1em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.12);border:1px solid rgba(212,95,71,0.22);">
   <div style="width:2.4em;height:2.4em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#FCEEEC;border:1px solid #F0C5BA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.5em;color:#D45F47;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:900;font-size:0.85em;">01</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#D45F47;line-height:1.2;">Counter-productivity</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.4em;">the visible cost</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 0.9em 1em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.12);border:1px solid rgba(86,84,162,0.22);">
   <div style="width:2.4em;height:2.4em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.5em;color:#5654A2;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:900;font-size:0.85em;">02</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;line-height:1.2;">The dilemma</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.4em;">no ground truth</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 0.9em 1em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.12);border:1px solid rgba(44,132,117,0.22);">
   <div style="width:2.4em;height:2.4em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#E5F2EE;border:1px solid #BCDFC0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.5em;color:#2C8475;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:900;font-size:0.85em;">03</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;line-height:1.2;">A workflow</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.4em;">human as gatekeeper</div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
